---
title: "Class 25: Difference-in-Differences, Part II"
date: 2026-04-14
---

The goal for today is to apply DD to real data on hospital uncompensated care and Medicaid expansion, and to discuss current issues with DD designs in practice.


## Objectives

- Understand and explain some of the difficulties when interpreting the results of regression-based DD estimates (TWFE with staggered adoption)
- Be aware of alternative estimators that may be applicable in some settings


## Activities

- Estimate an event study with constant treatment timing
- Estimate an event study with differential treatment timing
- Discuss the TWFE decomposition and modern DD estimators
